meta.title: Run Code Llama in Google Colab
meta.description:
Tutorial: Run Code Llama in less than 2 mins in a Free Colab Notebook.

**Colab Code Llama**
A Coding Assistant built on Code Llama (Llama 2).
Free notebook: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/17GjLg0zB6VSpFcoO_r_wZtaGqNV6VCxC?usp=sharing

**Colab Code Llama PRO**
- Upload chats and documents.
- Save/re-load chats.
- Get access for €4.99 ($5.49) at https://buy.stripe.com/cN24h2f4pa9ZbQY6oB 

Find Trelis on [HuggingFace](https://huggingface.co/Trelis) and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@TrelisResearch) - for videos on fine-tuning!

0:00 Code Llama Announcement
0:07 Run Code Llama in Google Colab
1:20 Upload files and save chats
